subcodes.first_line: We have heard thy call unto the Wronged One when He was in the hands of the ungodly, and from thy cry We perceived a fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ما نادیت به المظلوم اذ کان بین ایدی المشرکین و وجدنا من ندآئک عرف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
